name: Genji
description: An opportunistic, mobile Assassin who can tear apart a weak backline.
title: Cybernetic Ninja
info: Once the carefree youngest scion of the Shimada clan, Genji was cut down by his own brother for refusing to take part in their illegal ventures. Grafted into a cyborg body by Overwatch, Genji walks his own path as one who fights for what's right.

Genji.name: Shuriken
Genji.description: Throw 3 Shuriken in a spread pattern, each dealing 65 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit.  Stores up to 3 charges. Shuriken's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.

Genji.name: Deflect
Genji.description: Channel for 1.25 seconds, becoming Protected and blocking damage. Any damage blocked while channeling causes Genji to throw a Kunai toward the nearest enemy, prioritizing Heroes and dealing 55 (+4% per level) damage.  Total Damage Deflected: 0

Genji.name: Swift Strike
Genji.description: Dash forward, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in a line. Enemy Heroes that die within 1.5 seconds of being hit with Swift Strike cause the cooldown and mana cost to be refunded.

Genji.name: Dragonblade
Genji.description: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage.

Genji.name: X-Strike
Genji.description: Perform two slashes dealing 145 (+4% per level) damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in their area.

Genji.name: Cyber Agility
Genji.description: Activate to jump to the target area.

1.name: Swift as the Wind
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Swift Strike increases Genji's Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds.

1.name: Agile Dismount
1.description: While mounted the range of Cyber Agility is increased by 70%, its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds, and it Slows enemy Heroes in its landing area by 25% for 2 seconds.

1.name: Pathfinder
1.description: Jumping over terrain with Cyber Agility increases Movement Speed by 30%, and grants Stealth, for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji's Heroic Ability heals him for 10% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes, increasing up to 30% the lower Genji's Health is.

4.name: Shuriken Mastery
4.description: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Shuriken.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Shuriken damage is increased by 25.  Reward: After hitting 60 Heroes, Cyber Agility now refunds 3 charges of Shuriken.

4.name: Strike At The Heart
4.description: Enemies hit by the end of Swift Strike take an additional 134 (+4% per level) damage after 1 second.

4.name: Dragon Claw
4.description: After Genji blocks 330 (+4% per level) damage with Deflect, activate to release a Dragon Claw, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.

7.name: Augmented Guard
7.description: When Deflect ends, Genji gains a Shield equal to 100% of the damage blocked for 4 seconds.

7.name: Perfect Defense
7.description: Deflected damage reduces the cooldown of Deflect by 2 seconds, up to a maximum of 10 seconds.

7.name: Cyber Shield
7.description: Using Cyber Agility grants 40 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji dodges 1 Heroic Basic Attack every 5 seconds.

10.name: Dragonblade
10.description: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: X-Strike
10.description: Perform two slashes dealing 145 (+4% per level) damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in their area.

13.name: Shingan
13.description: Hitting an enemy with all 3 Shuriken deals 100 (+4% per level) bonus damage. Deals 40% less damage to Structures.

13.name: Flow Like Water
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit with Swift Strike reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.

13.name: Way Of The Shimada
13.description: Increase Genji's Basic Attack range by 1. Each time Genji hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase his Basic Attack damage by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 15%.

16.name: Reflect
16.description: Deflect also deals an additional 33% of the damage blocked.

16.name: Final Cut
16.description: After 1 second, Swift Strike deals an additional 125 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in the area.

16.name: Steady Blade
16.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Swift Strike increases the damage of the next Swift Strike by 30%. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.

20.name: The Dragon Becomes Me
20.description: Each time Dragonblade hits an enemy Hero, the duration of Dragonblade is increased by 0.5 seconds. If a Hero is killed within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Dragonblade, Swift Strike's cooldown is reset.

20.name: Living Weapon
20.description: Each enemy Hero hit by X-Strike reduces its cooldown by 12.5 seconds.

20.name: Sharpened Stars
20.description: Shuriken now pierce all enemies hit. Swift Strike's refund grants 1 charge of Shuriken.

20.name: Zanshin
20.description: Quest: Block 6500 damage with Deflect, including damage blocked so far.  Reward: Deflect hits all nearby enemy Heroes.

tooltipMarkup.GenjiCyberAgility: Activate to jump to the target area.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiCyberAgilityAgileDismount: While mounted the range of Cyber Agility is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,GenjiCyberAgilityAgileDismountIncreaseRange,EffectArray[0].Value - Abil,GenjiCyberAgility,Range)/Abil,GenjiCyberAgility,Range*100" player="0"/>%</c>, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GenjiCyberAgilityAgileDismountCooldownRefund,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds, and it Slows enemy Heroes in its landing area by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,GenjiCyberAgilityAgileDismountSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiCyberAgilityAgileDismountSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiCyberAgilityCyberShield: Using Cyber Agility grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiCyberAgilityCyberShield,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiCyberAgilityCyberShield,Duration" Precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Genji dodges <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Heroic Basic Attack every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiDodgeCountdown,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiCyberAgilityPathfinder: Jumping over terrain with Cyber Agility increases Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiCyberAgilityPathfinderSpeedBonus,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c>, and grants Stealth, for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiCyberAgilityPathfinderSpeedBonus,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Genji's Heroic Ability heals him for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiDragonbladeAttackDamage,LeechFraction[Life]*100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes, increasing up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,GenjiDragonbladeAttackDamage,LeechFraction[Life]+Accumulator,GenjiDragonsThirstLeechAccumulator,Ratio)*100"/>%</c> the lower Genji's Health is.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDeflect: Channel for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiDeflect,Duration" Precision="2"/></c> seconds, becoming Protected and blocking damage. Any damage blocked while channeling causes Genji to throw a Kunai toward the nearest enemy, prioritizing Heroes and dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiDeflectDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.<n/><n/>Total Damage Deflected: <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d score="GenericHeroRealScoreValue1" Precision="0"/></c>
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDeflectAugmentedGuard: When Deflect ends, Genji gains a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage blocked for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiDeflectAugmentedGuard,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDeflectDragonClawTalent: After Genji blocks <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiDeflectDragonClawDamageValue,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage with Deflect, activate to release a Dragon Claw, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiDeflectDragonClawDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to all nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDeflectPerfectDefense: Deflected damage reduces the cooldown of Deflect by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GenjiDeflectPerfectDefenseCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GenjiDeflectPerfectDefenseCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse * Behavior,GenjiDeflectPerfectDefenseTokenCounter,Max"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDeflectReflect: Deflect also deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="1 - Behavior,GenjiDeflectMissileLauncher,DamageResponse.ModifyFraction * 100" Precision="2"/>%</c> of the damage blocked.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDeflectZanshin: Quest: Block damage with Deflect, including damage blocked so far.Reward: Deflect hits all nearby enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDragonblade: Unleash the Dragonblade for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiDragonbladeActive,Duration"/></c> seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiDragonbladeAttackDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiDragonbladeTheDragonBecomesMe: Each time Dragonblade hits an enemy Hero, the duration of Dragonblade is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiDragonbladeTheDragonBecomesMeActiveIncreaseDurationDummyButtonEffect,Value"precision="2"/></c> seconds. If a Hero is killed within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiDragonbladeSwiftStrikeCooldownRefundBehavior,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds of being hit by Dragonblade, Swift Strike's cooldown is reset.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiShuriken: Throw <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Shuriken in a spread pattern, each dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiShurikenDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy hit.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,GenjiShuriken,Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges. Shuriken's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiShurikenSharpenedStars: Shuriken now pierce all enemies hit. Swift Strike's refund grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,GenjiShurikenSharpenedStarsAddShurikenCharges,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse"/></c> charge of Shuriken.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiShurikenShingan: Hitting an enemy with all <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiShurikenShinganCounter,MaxStackCount"/></c> Shuriken deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiShurikenShinganBonusDamage,Amount"/></c> bonus damage. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GenjiShurikenShinganBonusDamage,AttributeFactor[Structure] * 100"/>%</c> less damage to Structures.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiShurikenShurikenMastery: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Shuriken.Reward: After hitting Heroes, Shuriken damage is increased by .Reward: After hitting Heroes, Cyber Agility now refunds charges of Shuriken.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiSwiftStrike: Dash forward, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiSwiftStrikeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to all enemies in a line. Enemy Heroes that die within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiSwiftStrikeCooldownResetBehavior,Duration" Precision="2"/></c> seconds of being hit with Swift Strike cause the cooldown and mana cost to be refunded.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiSwiftStrikeFinalCut: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiFinalCutLaunchDelay,Duration+0.0625"/></c> second, Swift Strike deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiSwiftStrikeFinalCutDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to all enemies in the area.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiSwiftStrikeFlowLikeWater: Each enemy Hero hit with Swift Strike reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GenjiSwiftStrikeFlowLikeWaterRefundCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiSwiftStrikeSteadyBlade: Each enemy Hero hit by Swift Strike increases the damage of the next Swift Strike by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,GenjiSteadyBladeAccumulator,Scale * 100"/>%</c>. This bonus stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiSwiftStrikeSteadyBladeTokenCounter,Max"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiSwiftStrikeStrikeAtTheHeart: Enemies hit by the end of Swift Strike take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiSwiftStrikeStrikeAtTheHeartDamage,Amount"/></c> damage after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiSwiftStrikeStrikeAtTheHeart,Duration"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiSwiftStrikeSwiftAsTheWind: Hitting an enemy Hero with Swift Strike increases Genji's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiSwiftStrikeSwiftAsTheWind,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiSwiftStrikeSwiftAsTheWind,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiWayOfTheShimada: Increase Genji's Basic Attack range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,GenjiWayOfTheShimadaTalent,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c>. Each time Genji hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase his Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,GenjiWayOfTheShimadaDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiWayOfTheShimadaTimedBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiWayOfTheShimadaTokenCount,Max"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiXStrike: Perform two slashes dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiXStrikeLegDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. The slashes detonate after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenjiXStrikeStasis,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds causing an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GenjiXStrikeFinalDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in their area.
tooltipMarkup.GenjiXStrikeLivingWeapon: Each enemy Hero hit by X-Strike reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GenjiXStrikeLivingWeaponCooldownRefund,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
